description: Animates math text with pen-tracing. Content is in MATH MODE by default â€” every non-mathematical word or phrase MUST be wrapped in text(). Every non-mathematical word or phrase MUST be wrapped in text(). Example: "text(Centre =) (-3, -4)". Example: "text(Generating curve:) x = 2 + sin(y)". Supports creating new text, animating existing text, animating selections from select/selectexcept, cloning text to new positions, and animating table cells. Supports exclude() for selective animation and sub() for substitution.
utility: Animate math text with pen-tracing (math mode default, use text() for plain text)

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Position on canvas. Required for create mode and textitem_expr mode with cloning

arguments.name: content
arguments.description: ASCII math string for create mode, variable reference for existing/collection/textitem modes, or item() for textitem_expr mode

arguments.name: exclude
arguments.description: Skip animation for parts matching pattern. Multiple exclude() args allowed

arguments.name: type(invert)
arguments.description: Invert exclude behavior: animate ONLY the excluded parts

arguments.name: sub
arguments.description: Substitution pairs â€” find pattern is replaced with new value during animation. Multiple sub() args allowed

alternates.description: Create new math text and animate with pen-tracing
Animate all selected text from select() or selectexcept()
Animate a single text selection by variable
Clone text to a new position and animate it
Animate everything except the matched pattern
Animate with substitution â€” replaces x with 3
Colored text with custom font size

examples.scenario: Write standard form of a circle equation with fadein and comment (equation of a circle lesson)

examples.expression: write_4=write(at(22,8),"( x - âˆ’ h )^2+( y - âˆ’ k )^2= r^2",exclude("âˆ’",2),exclude("âˆ’",1),fadein(0.5))

examples.scenario: Write mixed text and math with text() wrapper

rules: write() is for MATH EXPRESSIONS with pen-tracing animation â€” equations, formulas, derivations, substitutions. NEVER use write() to label shapes or display computed values.
All non-mathematical words must be wrapped in text(). Example: "text(Generating curve:) x = 2 + sin(y)"
Multiple text() wrappers can appear in one string: "text(Area =) pi r^2 text( sq. units)"
Wrap only plain English words and phrases in text() â€” math symbols, variables, operators, and equations render directly
